title: Jimothy’s Backyard Dash
description: Guide Jimothy through a fast three-lane backyard race, dodging obstacles, collecting Moon Tokens, and battling two rivals across five streamed worlds.

prompt.objective: Build a three-lane backyard race starring a nimble raccoon.

mintAssets.brief: Raccoon racers, backyard hazards, rewards, power-ups, and a finish gate.
Five distinct backyard race worlds with RAD streams and colliders.
Music, ambience, movement, pickup, impact, boost, and race cues.

experience: Lane-switch, jump, scuttle, collect tokens, and spend a boost.
Race two rivals through five sections or loop in Endless Run.
prompt.visualDirection: Rounded backyard diorama, golden-hour light, moon motifs, and a crisp arcade HUD.

thumbnail.alt: Jimothy’s Backyard Dash menu showing three racers at the start of a three-lane backyard course.

social.title: Jimothy’s Backyard Dash
social.description: Race Jimothy through five backyard sections with rivals, shortcuts, power-ups, and Endless Run.

image.alt: Jimothy’s Backyard Dash menu showing three racers at the start of a three-lane backyard course.
